message:
fix(tests): update cache tests from localStorage to sessionStorage after #9147 (Fixes #9161) (#9202)

PR #9147 moved useCertManager and useDataCompliance from localStorage to
sessionStorage for security. Update all cache-related test assertions,
setup calls, and describe/it labels to use sessionStorage to match.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
